summary: Email Notification Settings feature fully tested. All 3 backend APIs working correctly. Frontend Settings modal shows Notification Preferences section with Email/WhatsApp toggles. Email is enabled, WhatsApp is disabled as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console shows 404 errors for /api/user/preferences endpoint - not critical but should be investigated
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email notification settings feature complete. APIs: GET /api/notification-settings/events, GET /api/notification-settings/channel-availability, PUT /api/notification-settings/preference all working. Frontend Settings modal has Notification Preferences section with toggles. Email enabled, WhatsApp disabled.

GET_notification_events.notes: Returns 6 notification events with email/whatsapp toggles and allowed status

GET_channel_availability.notes: Returns email_allowed: true, whatsapp_allowed: false, whatsapp_configured: false

PUT_preference_update.notes: Successfully updates individual notification preferences, validates event_key, blocks WhatsApp when not allowed

PUT_bulk_update.notes: Successfully updates multiple preferences at once

settings_modal_notification_section.notes: Notification Preferences section visible in Settings modal for therapist role

email_toggles_functional.notes: 6 email toggles found, all enabled and functional (can toggle ON/OFF)

whatsapp_toggles_disabled.notes: 4 WhatsApp toggles found, all correctly disabled (grayed out)

na_for_unsupported_events.notes: N/A shown for Password Changed and Subscription Expiry Warning WhatsApp toggles

preference_update_toast.notes: 'Preference updated' toast message appears when toggling
